description: A homeowner needs to file their return and wants to itemize deductions, including mortgage interest, state taxes, and charitable contributions.

nodes.task_description: Gather all necessary documentation (Form 1098, property tax bills, donation receipts).

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all required documents from the taxpayer.

nodes.task_description: Enter the data for mortgage interest, state and local taxes (SALT), and charitable giving onto Schedule A.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly inputs all itemized deduction information.

nodes.task_description: Compare the total itemized deductions to the standard deduction and use the larger amount on the final return.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that itemizing provides a greater tax benefit and finalizes the return.
